types.name: Activate
types.summary: Activate target map objects (enable interaction / visibility state).
types.description: Resolves each Objects[] TFID via map lookup and calls the cloned-object activate vfunc (vtable+0x114). Fires nested Reactions[] when complete.

types.name: Deactivate
types.description: Calls deactivate vfunc (vtable+0x118) on each Objects[] target.

types.name: Create
types.summary: Spawn clones of target template objects on the map.
types.description: FUN_004de550 spawns each Objects[] entry; chains nested reactions.

types.name: Delete
types.summary: Remove / despawn target objects from the map.
types.description: FUN_004db8b0 removes each Objects[] TFID (death flag 0). Does not grant loot.

types.name: MakeFriend
types.summary: Set friendly disposition (unimplemented in retail dispatch).
types.description: No switch case in CVOGReaction_Dispatch — falls through to default error log.

types.name: MakeEnemy
types.summary: Set hostile disposition (unimplemented in retail dispatch).
types.description: No switch case in CVOGReaction_Dispatch — falls through to default error log.

types.name: Death
types.description: FUN_004db8b0 with death flag 1 — triggers death handling on each Objects[] target.

types.name: TransferMap
types.summary: Warp activator to another map / instance.

types.name: ClientText
types.summary: Client-only text (no dispatch case in retail binary).
types.description: Enum value exists in map format but CVOGReaction_Dispatch has no case 11 — logs unknown type.

types.name: SkillCast
types.summary: Cast a skill on activator or resolved targets.

types.name: VariableSet
types.summary: Set a map variable to a constant or other variable value.

types.name: Text
types.summary: Show dialog / screen text to player; choices link to triggers.
types.description: When Text payload present: shows ChoiceDialog/OKDialog/ScreenTop/ChatQueue via FUN_0057a190/FUN_0057c4a0. Choice buttons fire TriggerCoid (not nested reactions).

Objects.label: Optional target list for text params

types.name: ResetTrigger
types.summary: Reset a trigger volume by COID.

types.name: SetFaction
types.summary: Set faction on player / character targets.

types.name: ResetFaction
types.summary: Reset faction to default on targets.

types.name: SetFactionFromVar
types.summary: Set faction from map variable value.

types.name: SetHP
types.summary: Set HP to a percentage of maximum.

types.name: Boost
types.summary: Apply physics impulse boost to targets.
types.description: Reads magnitude from map variable via FUN_005b05f0, normalizes facing vector with FUN_0040d260, applies physics impulse vfunc (+0x40) on CVOGPhysicsBase targets.

types.name: RemoveFromInv
types.description: FUN_005721c0 removes item by CBID/slot rule from activator inventory.

types.name: AdjustCredits
types.summary: Add credits to activator (clamped ±500000 per tick).

types.name: MarkRepairStation
types.summary: Bookmark repair station for INC airlift / respawn.
types.description: FUN_00521e00(GenericVar1) stores repair-station id on the player character (offsets 0x740/0x744) and updates world position via FUN_004d38b0. This is the "last repair station visited" used by INC.

types.name: GiveMission
types.summary: Give mission to character on map.

types.name: CompleteObjective
types.summary: Complete current mission objective for mission id.
types.description: FUN_00533f90(missionId, 0xFFFFFFFF, 0xFFFFFFFF, 1) advances objective chain, grants rewards/XP/credits, may show "Completed!" UI. ObjectiveIDCheck in map file is validated in CanTrigger, not passed to handler.

types.name: UnlockContObj
types.summary: Unlock continent / zone object for player.

types.name: GiveMissionDialog
types.summary: Open mission-offer dialog filtered by mission types.

types.name: GiveItemNumCBID
types.summary: Give item by CBID to activator.

types.name: GiveItemNumCBIDGen
types.summary: Give procedurally generated item by CBID.

types.name: OpenBodyShop
types.description: Sends client UI packet via FUN_004059f0 with opcode 1.

types.name: SetPath
types.summary: Assign AI path to target creatures.

types.name: SetPatrolDistance
types.summary: Write patrol distance variable into creature path data.

types.name: Teleport
types.summary: Teleport targets to offset from path node.

types.name: TimerStop
types.summary: Stop a map timer and fire nested reactions.

types.name: VariableSetRandom
types.summary: Set map variable to random value in [min, max] range.
types.description: Uses global RNG table FUN_007a4330: value = rand * GenericVar2 + GenericVar1 (after abs on GenericVar1). Writes via FUN_005afbc0.

GenericVar3.label: Minimum offset (timer id field reused as min in maps)

types.name: VariableMul
types.summary: Multiply map variable by another variable value.

types.name: VariableDiv
types.summary: Divide map variable by another variable value.

types.name: OpenStore
types.description: Sends client UI packet via FUN_004059f0 with opcode 3 and store id in payload.

types.name: SetTeamFaction
types.summary: Set team faction on character targets.

types.name: SetTeamFactionFromVar
types.summary: Set team faction from map variable.

types.name: AddPoints
types.summary: Add arena points (or decrement if GenericVar3 set).

types.name: ResetPoints
types.summary: Reset arena points for activator or all.

types.name: SetActiveObjective
types.summary: Highlight active mission objective in UI.
types.description: Fires nested objective reactions then sends FUN_004059f0 UI packet (opcode 0x12) with mission/objective ids when activator matches active objective.

types.name: SetMapWaypoint
types.summary: Set static map waypoint at target object position.

types.name: SetMapDynamicWaypoint
types.summary: Set dynamic map waypoint following target.

types.name: FailMission
types.description: FUN_0052da30(missionId) logs failure and sends fail-mission packet (EMSG_Sector_FailMission / opcode 0x20B2).

types.name: OpenDialog
types.summary: Open generic dialog UI (same text path as Text reaction).

types.name: Path
types.summary: Assign path from MiscText name to targets.

types.name: CaptureOutpost
types.summary: Capture outpost for team at object position.

types.name: RollFromLootTable
types.summary: Roll loot table presentation on client.

types.name: RaceWaypointReached
types.summary: Notify race waypoint reached (crazy taxi objectives).
